items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of customer approval or auto-accept.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Customer approval or auto-accept', but the evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this behavior. While the linked use case describes the expected behavior of customer confirmation via text message, there is no direct evidence of the system's handling of customer responses or the auto-accept process. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's validation.
